features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
LIGHTLY POWDERED LATEX: Latex gloves with USP grade corn starch powder for improved ease of donning and increased comfort; designed for use in food processing, cleaning and painting

HIGH LEVELS OF ELASTICITY AND COMFORT: These single use gloves are made from optimal quality, lightly powdered latex, providing high levels of elasticity and comfort, plus an ambidextrous fit means no hassle if you need to replace a glove

SUITABLE FOR CONTACT WITH FOOD: The beaded cuff gives extra durability and helps prevent liquid roll back whilst the lightweight construction provides good tactile sensitivity and is suitable for contact with food

TOUCHSCREEN: Textured palms and fingertips provide improved grip, particularly in wet or oily conditions; the gloves also meet industrial standards for pinholes, ensuring hygienic handling at all times
INCLUDES: 1 x box of 100 Unigloves Unicare Latex GS0024 single use gloves, food safe, lightly powdered, chlorinated AQL 1.5, size L, in natural
